summary.text: [0-2] A diagonal streak of white and lime green light fades out as a white screen reveals a logo featuring a green robot figure beside 'ANDROID' in a green bar and 'AUTHORITY' in dark grey. [2-4] A split-screen layout appears; the top section displays a red square logo above 'IFA 2015' and 'ANDROID AUTHORITY COVERAGE', while the bottom retains the green robot logo. [4-10] The scene cuts to a gold smartphone resting diagonally on a white table, displaying a bright green lightsaber wallpaper, a dock of four colorful app icons, and a status bar reading '3:54 PM'. [10-14] The phone remains stationary on the surface as the screen wallpaper transitions from the green lightsaber to a blue lightsaber, with the icons and status bar persisting.

From 14s to 26s, a gold metallic Huawei smartphone stands vertically on a white surface, leaning against a clear glass container. The rear view displays a square camera module and flash near the top, a square fingerprint sensor below it, and the "HUAWEI" logo near the bottom edge under soft lighting. At 26s, the scene cuts to the phone held in hands, displaying the "Photos" app interface with tabs for "Photos", "Albums", and "Cloud". The status bar shows "3:56 PM". A list of albums includes "Camera", "Bluetooth", "Screenshots", "Magazine unlock", and "Recommended photos". A finger interacts with the screen, tapping "Magazine unlock". By 28s, the display transitions to a grid view of thumbnails within the "Magazine unlock" album, revealing various colorful images.

[28-30] A gold smartphone held in hands displays a grid of thumbnail images within the "Magazine unlock" album, with the status bar consistently showing the time as "3:56 PM". [30-32] The display transitions from the grid to a full-screen image of red flowers in a vase against a blue background, where a finger touching the lower left screen triggers a translucent blue circle overlay. [32-42] The user drags their finger across the touchscreen, activating a circular magnifying glass overlay that dynamically reveals zoomed-in close-ups of the vase, green stems, leaves, and red petals corresponding to the specific touch position on the display.

[42-46] On a gold smartphone displaying a red flower photo, a finger drags a circular magnifying overlay. The zoomed view shifts from a yellow and orange flower bud to dark green leaves, ending on a blurry light purple vase section.
[46-50] The screen transitions to a home interface with a green lightsaber wallpaper. Icons include a purple App Center (red '20' badge), blue Themes, Settings, and Camera. The bottom dock features phone, contacts, messages, and browser apps above the HUAWEI logo. A finger moves from the blue phone icon to the pink contacts icon containing a white silhouette.
[50-54] The display switches to a multitasking view with two app previews and text "2 GB of 3 GB free" and "Tap to clear all apps". It returns to the home screen where the finger presses the pink contacts icon.
[54-56] The interface changes to a white menu listing "Yellow pages", "Sign in to an account", "Import contacts", and "Create a new contact". A finger rests on the left edge of the device frame.

[56-62] A gold Huawei smartphone transitions from a white contact menu to a home screen featuring a green lightsaber wallpaper. Icons for App Center, Themes, Settings, and Camera appear above a dock with Phone, Contacts, Messages, and Browser. The user navigates to a white page with a '+' symbol and 'Menu' option, then returns to the home interface. [62-66] The display switches to a multitasking view showing app previews and text '1.58 GB of 3 GB free' and 'Flick up to clear all apps,' before reverting to the home screen. [66-70] On the home screen, a finger presses the blue browser icon with a white globe located in the bottom right of the dock.

[70-78] A gold smartphone displays a home screen featuring a vertical green lightsaber wallpaper. Icons include a purple App Center with a '20' badge, Themes, Settings, and Camera. A finger presses a blue browser icon with a white globe in the bottom right dock. The status bar shows "No card" and "4:02 PM". The Huawei logo is on the bottom bezel. [78-82] The display switches to a camera application interface showing a light surface viewfinder with modes like 'Photo' and 'Video', then transitions back to the lightsaber home screen. [82-84] The screen changes to a browser interface with a "Search or type URL" bar. A grid of shortcuts appears, including Baidu, Taobao, Sina, a red play button, "58", a green book, a camel, "ALZA", "VMALL", and a blue Huawei logo.

[86-90] The gold smartphone display switches from a home screen with a green lightsaber wallpaper to a camera application interface. Held in two hands, the viewfinder brightens from dark to show a light blue surface, with bottom text options like "Light painting" and "Beauty" visible alongside top icons. [90-94] The screen transitions back to the home screen featuring the vertical green lightsaber wallpaper against a black background. A grid of app icons for "App Center," "Themes," "Settings," and "Camera" appears at the bottom, while a finger rests on the top right edge and the status bar time updates to 4:03 PM. [94-96] The device lies flat on a white surface, displaying a white interface with a large red circle. A finger presses the center of the circle, and text reading "Maximum weight: 400 g" is visible near the bottom left corner.

A gold smartphone with a metallic frame lies flat on a white table while a finger presses the display. The large central circle transitions from blue to green as numerical scale indicators change from values near 260 to lower numbers like 120 and 140. The circle changes color from green to red, and text at the bottom updates to read "Maximum weight: 400 g". It then shifts from red to green, updating the text to "Minimum weight: 100 g" as scale indicators appear near the bottom edge. The circle transitions from green to red again with the "Maximum weight: 400 g" text. Finally, the circle transitions to blue, and the text at the bottom updates to read "Place the object to weigh on the screen" while numerical scale markings like 220 and 240 appear near the circle's edge.

A finger presses a large blue circle on a gold smartphone screen resting on a white surface, where numerical scale markings reading '220' and '240' are visible along an arc. The text 'Place the object to weigh on the screen' appears at the bottom left. As the finger maintains pressure, the central circle changes color from blue to red, and corresponding numerical indicators on the curved scale shift to display '360', '380', and '400'. Faint text at the bottom reads 'Maximum weight: 400 g' as the device remains stationary. Finally, the gold smartphone stands upright leaning against a glass container on a white table. The screen shows a blue circle with 'No card', 'Fun scale', and the time '4:08 PM' at the top, while text at the bottom reads 'Place the object to weigh in the center of the tray'.

[122-128] A gold smartphone stands upright on a white table, leaning against a clear glass container. The screen displays the 'Fun scale' interface featuring a central blue circle and the text 'Place the object to weigh in the center of the tray' at the bottom, with the time reading 4:08 PM. A blurred figure stands in the background. [128-130] The camera angle shifts to show the back of the gold smartphone lying on the white surface. The metallic casing reflects soft lighting and features horizontal antenna lines near the top edge. A square camera module and flash are located near the top, with a fingerprint sensor positioned directly below.

[130-136] The view remains fixed on the upper rear section of a gold smartphone lying on a white surface. A square camera module and flash are visible near the top edge, situated directly above a square fingerprint sensor. Soft light reflects off the smooth metallic casing and the camera lens, highlighting the antenna band near the rim. The lighting stays consistent, emphasizing the device's premium finish. [136-138] The camera angle shifts slightly downwards, revealing more of the lower back where a faint logo appears. Reflections on the smooth casing and square camera module change subtly as the view adjusts. The text "ANDROID AUTHORITY" is visible in the bottom right corner.

[138-146] A gold smartphone transitions from lying flat to standing upright on a white surface, leaning against a clear glass container. The device's rear panel faces the camera, showcasing a square camera module, flash, fingerprint sensor, and the "HUAWEI" logo near the bottom. Soft lighting reflects off the smooth metallic casing against a blurred background as the phone remains stationary in its upright position.

[120-122] A gold smartphone stands upright on a white table, leaning against a clear glass container, displaying a 'Fun scale' interface with a blue circle and the instruction 'Place the object to weigh in the center of the tray'. [146-150] The view shifts to the rear metallic panel, showing a square camera module, flash, fingerprint sensor, and 'HUAWEI' logo; a person's arm in dark clothing becomes visible in the blurred background to the left. [150-152] The scene transitions to a black screen with a green lens flare, followed by a white background displaying a green robot logo next to 'ANDROID' inside a green rectangle and 'AUTHORITY' in light grey text below.
